title: ItemsAdderAdmintools
description: With this plugin you are able to refresh your furniture in game with out having to break it by hand! It aslo allows for replace large amounts of the same furniture quickly!
body:
**This plugin requires [ItemsAdder](https://builtbybit.com/resources/itemsadder.10839/) and [Worldedit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit)(or [FAWE](https://modrinth.com/plugin/fastasyncworldedit)) to work!**

## What does this plugin do?
This plugin gives you the ability to refresh the furniture of itemsadder in your selection. You might ask your self why is this usefull? This is usefull beacuse itemsadder doesn't update the furniture when you make changes to it in the config. So when you for example have a big area filled with park benches made in itemsadder. And you make some changes to it the benches won't update. But this plugin helps you to update all those benches at once!

## Best Practice
It isn't recommended to use this command when there are normal player online beacuse the refresh/replace command will cause a noticeable amount of lag when used with a big selection.

## Development
If you have some feature you would like to be added to this plugin. Leave a suggestion in the issues tab of the git repo!

# Instalation
1. Put this plugin in your plugin folder. And make sure you have Worldedit and ItemsAdder installed.
2. Restart your server.
3. You are done!

# Usage of refreshfurniture command
1. Create a selection.
2. Run the command /refreshfurniture
3. All the furniture should be updated right now!


# Usage of replacefurniture command
1. Create a selection.
2. Run the command /replacefurniture <oldnamespacedID> <newnamespacedID>
3. All the furniture should be updated right now!

# Ussage of other commands:
- /removeresourepack <player> - Removes the resourecpack for the selected player. If no player is given the command will apply for the sender.
  
- /iaextrainfo <infotype (see autocompletion)> <namespaced string> - Get the desired info from a item. From CustomModelData to the new item_model value. When no namespaced string give it will try to get the item in your main hand.

- /scanselection - Scan the selected region for items that are in any container.
